unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.description: Click below to stop receiving emails from this restaurant.
unsubscribe.confirmDescription: Confirm below that you no longer wish to receive emails. You can always book again — you will then receive a fresh confirmation for that reservation.
unsubscribe.successBody: We won't email you again. Thanks for letting us know.
unsubscribe.alreadyBody: This email address is already on the unsubscribe list.
unsubscribe.invalidBody: This link is no longer valid. It may have been used already or expired.
unsubscribe.errorBody: Please try again later, or contact the restaurant.
